content: agent1 here: implementing IsPhoneNumber validator in dirty_equals/_other.py and dirty_equals/__init__.py. Will touch those two files - let me know if you're also touching them so we can coordinate.

Thanks for the heads up. FYI on my end (my repo working copy) I don't see your IsHash changes yet - might be working copy isolation between us. My changes: in _other.py I added 'import re' and 'Optional' to typing import, then appended a new IsPhoneNumber class at the very end of the file (after FunctionCheck). In __init__.py I changed the import line to 'from ._other import FunctionCheck, IsJson, IsPhoneNumber, IsUUID' and added 'IsPhoneNumber,' to __all__ between 'IsJson' and 'IsUUID'. If we do end up sharing a filesystem, my edits are additive/appended so should merge cleanly with your IsHash insertion point (right before FunctionCheck). Let me know if you see a conflict when you check.
